statement.p: Solve the following system of equations by graphing.

solution.p: If we graph these lines, we find they are the same line.

image.shortdescription: a coordinate plot of two lines that are coinciding; they each have a y-intercept of (0,-5) and an x-intercept of (8,0)

solution.p: So there are infinitely many solutions: all points (x_1,y_1) on that common line.
